name: model-ideas-to-tickets
description: Turn rough ideas into concise, codebase-grounded Jira tickets.

interface.shortDescription: Turn rough ideas into codebase-grounded Jira tickets
interface.longDescription: A staged orchestrator skill that refines vague ideas, sanity-checks them against the codebase, structures them into a concise ticket hierarchy written to Markdown files, and offers best-effort Jira creation when a Jira/Atlassian MCP is connected.
defaultPrompt: Turn these ideas into well-organized Jira tickets
